items.name_cn:
Top-tier factory original with full packaging
Dior D-LITE Handbag
 ✨ Flowered apricot butterfly five-grid embroidery ✨
 This Lady D-Lite handbag blends classic elegance with a fashionable look. Embroidered throughout with Pietro Ruffo's design, highlighting the classic beauty of the butterfly, accented with the text L'envol des papillons dévoile nos désirs aux étoiles. The front features the Christian Dior Paris logo, paired with a light gold-finished metal D.I.O.R. charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Medium size, with a detachable embroidered wide shoulder strap, can be carried by hand or crossbody.
Model:D6814, Dimensions: 24 x 20 x 11cm,📸 Exclusive real-life photos🎞✨ with original packaging gift box🎁]

items.name_en: Top-tier original factory, comes with full packaging
items.name_cn:
Top-tier original factory, comes with full packaging
Miss Dior Allover
Model: 2610
Size: 22 x 11 x 6 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 wallet, and lipstick
This Miss Dior flap bag made its debut at the Dior Fall/Winter 2024 Ready-to-Wear show, reinterpreting the modern elegance of the Dior classic. Meticulously crafted in pink quilted calfskin, accented with the classic Miss Dior Allover pattern of this series, inspired by Marc Bohan's Dior design archives, reinterpreting the 1960s fashion style in a modern way. Paired with contrasting vintage gold-finish metal charm, accented with the Miss Dior logo, highlighting the timeless aesthetic. The main compartment under the flap features a zip pocket for storing various daily items. Paired with an adjustable strap, can be worn on the shoulder for a high-fashion look
Miss Dior logo gold-finish metal charm
Magnetic flap closure
Adjustable leather shoulder strap
Internal compartment
Internal zip pocket and slip pocket

items.name_cn:
Top-tier original, comes with full packaging
🤟Miss Dior Flap Bag 'Berry Graffiti'
This Miss Dior Flap Bag made its debut at the Dior Fall/Winter 2024 Haute Couture show, reinterpreting the modern elegance of the Dior classic. Crafted from berry red calfskin, paired with a contrasting enamel metal plate featuring the classic Miss Dior Graffiti pattern, showcasing enduring aesthetics. The main compartment under the flap features a zip pocket for organizing daily essentials. With an adjustable strap, it can be worn over the shoulder for a high-fashion look.
Main material: Calfskin
Lining: Calfskin
Enamel Miss Dior Graffiti plate
Magnetic flap closure
Adjustable leather shoulder strap
Internal compartment
Internal zip pocket and slip pocket
Model: 2610
Dimensions: 22 x 11 x 6 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 wallet, and lipstick
